info.name: MovieRec (Recon) API Tests
info.description:
Complete API test collection for the Recon MovieRec application.

Covers:
- Next.js API routes (auth, movies, watchlist, preferences, recommendations)
- Flask backend API routes (health, movies, search, recommend)

item.name: 1 - Flask Backend
item.description: Tests for the Python Flask backend running on port 5000

request.description: Verify the Flask backend is running
Fetch popular movies from TMDB via Flask backend

exec: //   pm.expect(body.results.length).to.be.greaterThan(0); // disabled because TMDB soft-fail can return empty array

request.description: Fetch trending movies from TMDB via Flask backend

exec: //   pm.expect(body.results.length).to.be.greaterThan(0); // disabled because TMDB soft-fail can return empty array

request.description: Get details for a specific movie (default: Fight Club id=550)
Negative test: invalid movie ID should return 400
Search for movies by title
Negative test: empty search returns empty results
Get movie recommendations based on a specific movie

item.name: 3 - Login (Get Session Cookie)
item.description: Authenticate via NextAuth credentials to get a session cookie for protected routes

request.description: Must run before credentials login so CSRF token/cookie can be sent to callback endpoint.
Login with email/password credentials. The response sets a session cookie automatically.

exec: // NextAuth may redirect depending on config/env.
// Extract session cookie for later use (supports secure and non-secure names)

request.description: Get the CSRF token needed for NextAuth login. Run this BEFORE login if you get CSRF errors.
Check current session info. Returns user data if authenticated.

item.name: 4 - Protected: Watchlist
item.description: Watchlist CRUD operations - require session cookie

request.description: Get the user's full watchlist
Negative test: no session cookie should return 401
Filter watchlist by status (watchlist or completed)
Add a movie to the watchlist

item.name: 4.5 POST Add to Watchlist - Invalid ID

request.description: Negative test: non-numeric movie id
Mark a movie as completed

item.name: 5 - Protected: Preferences
item.description: User preference endpoints - require session cookie

request.description: Get current user preferences
Negative test: no session should return 401
Save user onboarding preferences
Negative test: invalid JSON body
Get personalized movie recommendations based on preferences + watchlist

Get recommendations based on a specific movie (hybrid TMDB + watchlist re-ranking)

item.name: 7 - Extension Token API
item.description: Chrome extension token management - require session cookie
